title: Romantic Uruguayan Rice Bowl
description: A silky, bittersweet rice bowl inspired by Uruguayan flavors, featuring toasted rice krispies, charred red peppers, and a citrus‑sesame glaze.
instructions: Toast 1 cup rice krispies in a dry skillet over medium heat, stirring frequently until golden, about 3 minutes.
Cook 1 cup jasmine rice according to package instructions, about 18 minutes.
Heat 1 tbsp coconut oil in a pan, add 1 cup diced roasted red peppers, and sauté for 2 minutes.
Stir in 1 cup black beans, 1 tsp smoked paprika, and 1 tsp sea salt; cook for 3 minutes until warmed.
In a small bowl, whisk 1 tbsp lime juice with 2 tbsp toasted sesame seeds.
Combine the cooked rice, sautéed peppers and beans, and toasted rice krispies in a large bowl.
Drizzle the lime‑sesame mixture over the rice mixture and toss gently to coat evenly.
Sprinkle chopped fresh cilantro over the bowl, if using.
Transfer the finished bowl into a bento‑box, reserving a small side compartment for extra salsa.
Serve immediately or keep chilled until ready to eat.
